services.name: SEO Audit & Strategy
services.description: Comprehensive technical and content SEO audit with a prioritized 90-day roadmap tied to business outcomes.
scope: Technical infrastructure audit (crawlability, indexation, Core Web Vitals)
services.idealClient: Brands with existing organic presence that has plateaued, or new sites preparing for launch.
services.deliverable: 90-day prioritized strategy document with effort/impact scoring

services.name: AI Search & GEO Strategy
services.description: Optimization strategy for AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity, and generative search surfaces.
scope: GEO audit — how AI systems currently represent your brand
Structured data implementation (FAQPage, HowTo, Article, Person)
Brand monitoring setup across AI platforms
services.idealClient: Brands seeing declining CTR despite improving rankings, or companies wanting proactive AI search positioning.
services.deliverable: GEO strategy document + structured data implementation

services.name: Content Strategy & Topical Authority
services.description: Topical cluster architecture, intent mapping, and content audit framework for compounding organic growth.
scope: Search intent mapping across the funnel
services.idealClient: Companies with large content libraries underperforming on organic, or teams planning significant content investment.
services.deliverable: Content architecture document + prioritized content calendar

services.name: SEO Analytics & Revenue Attribution
services.description: Tying organic search KPIs to business outcomes — beyond rankings and traffic to pipeline and revenue.
scope: GA4 + GSC integration and event architecture
KPI recalibration for AI search era
services.idealClient: Organizations needing to justify SEO investment to leadership or recalibrate measurement for the zero-click era.
services.deliverable: Analytics architecture + reporting framework + executive dashboard

_agent.note: This is 1 of 6 structured tool endpoints. Discover all tools at the manifest.
